bead.title: grading: bounded evidence assembly including PostRunOut/PostRunOK/ToolCalls
bead.description:
Stage C2 of FEAT-022. Modify buildGradingPrompt to use
cli/internal/evidence primitives with a minimum evidence floor,
include PostRunOut/PostRunOK/ToolCalls bounded via ClampOutput, and
emit a pre-dispatch short-circuit outcome class.

Implements FEAT-022 requirement §6 and §7 for the grader path.
Contributes to US-225.

Depends on Stage A1 (ddx-64299657) only. Independent of Stage B/C1.

PINNED event name (fixed here, consumed by Stage F): the pre-dispatch
short-circuit outcome event is emitted as 'compare-error:
context_overflow'. The same class name used in Stage C1 for review
(see FEAT-022 §12) is mirrored on the grading side, with the event
kind prefix adapted to the grading context. Stage F reads this name
when aggregating metrics.

In-scope files:
- cli/internal/agent/grade.go (buildGradingPrompt at :58: route arm
  Output, PostRunOut, ToolCalls through evidence.ClampOutput; route
  arm Diff through evidence.ClampDiff + evidence.DecomposeDiff;
  include arm.PostRunOK as a boolean field in the prompt; implement
  priority-ordered assembly with minimum floor: rubric + task prompt
  + per-arm identity always present)
- cli/internal/agent/grade.go (pre-dispatch short-circuit: if
  assembled prompt exceeds MaxPromptBytes after all trimming, skip
  provider dispatch and emit 'compare-error: context_overflow')
- Tests: fixture with multi-MB arm outputs and diffs exercising
  minimum floor preservation, PostRunOut/PostRunOK/ToolCalls
  inclusion (bounded), pre-dispatch short-circuit event emission

Out-of-scope:
- Review path (Stage C1)
- Section-level telemetry (Stage F)
- Ref-only-metadata alternative for grading (rejected in round 2:
  compare sandboxes are deleted before the record returns unless
  KeepSandbox is set; inline-with-cap is the correct strategy)

Rollback: revert grade.go changes; compare tests fall back to
prior behavior.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestBuildGradingPrompt ./internal/agent/... passes including tests for: arm output trimming (fixture arm.Output = 10× MaxOutputBytes or equivalent cap, assert bounded + truncation marker), minimum floor preservation (fixture total = 20× MaxPromptBytes; output still contains rubric, task prompt, and each arm's identity (harness, model) verbatim), PostRunOut/PostRunOK/ToolCalls inclusion after ClampOutput (each appears in output with truncation marker when clamped), pre-dispatch short-circuit. cd cli && go test -run TestGradingContextOverflow ./internal/agent/... passes: given a fixture that forces residual overflow, the grader emits an event whose body contains the literal substring 'compare-error: context_overflow' and the event's recorded provider-dispatch count remains 0. AST/import check: cd cli && go test -run TestEvidencePrimitiveUsage ./internal/agent/... asserts grade.go imports cli/internal/evidence and contains no direct os.ReadFile calls unless annotated. Existing comparison tests under cli/internal/agent/ still pass unchanged.

governing.title: Feature: Prompt Evidence Assembly and Size Invariants
